title: The super god road
description: The Suer God Road mod has added many new equipment, props, and building materials to the game.
body:
# Mod Introduction：
The Suer God Road mod has added many new equipment, props, and building materials to the game.

Add multiple biota, a boss, and a brand new dimension.

# Basic Introduction：
Tool types: Shine Gold, Magic Steel, Mithril, Copper, Tin, Bronze, Steel;

New dimension: a gloomy place;

Special props: Magic Crystal Ring, other special equipment;

BOSS: The Golden Emperor. To synthesize a dusty golden holy sword, place it on the ground and summon it with the right click of the Star of the Lower Realm.

# FAQ:
Can I include The Super God Road in my mod pack?

Of course can!
